answer_en:
Bulbospongiosus m.
Stabilizes the perineal body
Constricts the vaginal orifice
Compresses the bulb of the vestibule (to help maintain clitoral erection and express secretions of the greater vestibular glands)

details: Compresses the bulb of the vestibule (to help maintain clitoral erection and express secretions of the greater vestibular glands)
